channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Physicists create a mini universe where time emerges without a clock
item.description: Researchers at the University of Birmingham used 24,000 ultracold atoms to simulate a tiny universe where time appears only with change.

item.title: Study debunks myth about baby rattlesnake danger
item.description: A new study disproves the belief that baby rattlesnakes are more dangerous than adults, finding that young snakes can control their venom.

item.title: Exoplanet with no sunrise or sunset may still be habitable
item.description: A planet with one side perpetually hot and the other frozen in darkness might still support life, researchers suggest.

item.title: Hidden immune backup system could boost mRNA cancer vaccines
item.description: Researchers discovered that mRNA cancer vaccines can activate an unexpected immune cell type, enhancing tumor-fighting responses.
